name: DutyRateLookup
description: Calculates US import duty rates for a given HTS code. Applies MFN base rate, Section 301 China tariffs, ADD/CVD margins, MPF and HMF federal fees.

functions.name: resolveRate
calculateFees
functions.operation:
.totalValueUsd as $val | .dutyRatePct as $rate |
        ($val * $rate / 100) as $dutyAmt |
        ([($val * 0.003464), 27.23] | max) as $mpf |
        (if $mpf > 528.33 then 528.33 else $mpf end) as $mpfCapped |
        ($val * 0.00125) as $hmf |
        {dutyAmountUsd: ($dutyAmt | . * 100 | round / 100),
         mpfAmount: ($mpfCapped | . * 100 | round / 100),
         hmfAmount: ($hmf | . * 100 | round / 100)}

functions.name: assembleBreakdown
functions.operation: {json: ({htsCode: .htsCode, supplierCountry: .supplierCountry, totalValueUsd: .totalValueUsd, dutyRatePct: .rateResult.dutyRatePct, mfnRate: .rateResult.mfnRate, section301Rate: .rateResult.section301Rate, addCvdRate: .rateResult.addCvdRate, tariffBasis: .rateResult.tariffBasis, dutyAmountUsd: .feeResult.dutyAmountUsd, mpfAmount: .feeResult.mpfAmount, hmfAmount: .feeResult.hmfAmount, totalLandedDutyUsd: ((.feeResult.dutyAmountUsd + .feeResult.mpfAmount + .feeResult.hmfAmount) | . * 100 | round / 100), calculatedAt: "HACKATHON-DEMO", dataSource: "USITC HTS 2024 — Hackathon Simulation"} | tojson)}
